summary: RR0-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 is CLOSED after systems R3 recommended R0_GATE=PASS, independent QA R3 accepted, Lead integration gates passed, PR #249 passed both required CI checks, and the accepted evidence entered origin/main at 81b11f1a7a0210591cd266b8fcf6a47edd6da554. R0_GATE=PASS. No R1 implementation task has been created or started; the next action is controlled R1 task-graph creation and independent review.

decisions.decision: R0_GATE=PASS. The recovery baseline is trustworthy enough to permit controlled R1 task-graph planning.
Close RR0-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 only after PR #249 and required CI placed accepted evidence in origin/main.
Create and independently review RR1-TASK-GRAPH-001 before starting any R1 implementation task.

risks.summary: Normal Web/Electron still lacks authoritative Worker command/query/save/load/time-control integration.
The protected M7 worktree retains exactly 20 pre-existing entries and remains untouched.
R1 must replace static evidence with real Worker/runtime integration tests.

requested_action: Create RR1-TASK-GRAPH-001 on a controlled branch, route it to systems architect and independent QA, merge the accepted graph through CI, then start the highest-priority READY R1 task.
